monochrome_logs.help_text: Should logs appear in plain ASCII

manifest.help_text: Input manifest CSV with (required) header line 'ID,R1,R2', containing per sample paths to .fastq.gz files

outdir.help_text: Path to top directory containing all results, by default 'results' within the launch directory.

skip_main.help_text: Run only reference preparatory steps, skipping read pseudoalignment through to binning.

ref_mode.help_text: Mode for processing of reference or index inputs. Choose from: 'index', 'full', 'refine', 'autoselect'.

references.help_text: Path to text file containing paths to references, one per line. Optional if --sylph_refset is true, or if --themisto_index and --ref_groups are provided.

representatives.help_text: Number of representatives at which to cap each reference cluster.

refine_refs.help_text: Set to true to subselect representative genomes from clustered references.

species_ref_cache.help_text: Path to a cache directory containing per-species subdirectories with references.txt and groups.txt files for reuse in autoselect mode.

cluster_tool.help_text: Tool to use for clustering references when ref_mode is `refine` or `full` (poppunk|sketchlib)

poppunk_model.help_text: Clustering model for poppunk to use (dbscan|bgmm)

publish_poppunk.help_text: Optionally publish full poppunk output, group assignments are always published.

temp_dir.help_text: Absolute path to custom temporary storage directory to be used during runtime. Otherwise local /tmp will be used.

temp_space.help_text: Amount of /tmp space (MB) that will be reserved for index creation and pseudoalignment, if /tmp is being used as the temporary storage directory.

themisto_index.help_text: Path to a pre-built Themisto index including the index prefix (without exts). Skips indexing if provided.

kmer_size.help_text: K-mer size to use for index and pseudoalignment (21|31|51). If providing an index ensure k-mer size is identical.

ref_groups.help_text: Grouped references text file, one line per reference. Mandatory when pre-built index is supplied to --themisto_index.

get_assignments.help_text: Output the read assignment table used by mGEMS for binning.

min_abundance.help_text: Only bin reads for groups that have a relative abundance higher than this value.
